name: vectorworks
description: Claude Code plugin for connecting to Vectorworks 2024/2025 through the local Vectorworks MCP connector. Bundles setup, diagnosis, listener ping, CAD workflow skills, and an MCP server definition.

vectorworks_repo.title: Vectorworks MCP repo
vectorworks_repo.description: Folder containing server.py, vw_listener.py, and scripts/run-mcp-server.ps1. Leave blank when launching Claude Code from the vectorworks-mcp repo.
